name: Seagrass Charcoal Peel and Stick Wallpaper - Threshold™
description:
Elevate your home decor with this Seagrass Charcoal Wallpaper from Threshold™. This wallpaper features a sleek pattern of seagrass on a charcoal backdrop that's perfect for livening up a kitchen, bathroom or living room. Boasting a self-adhesive back, this wallpaper is easy to apply for a mess-free experience. It provides enough for covering 27.5 square feet of space and boasts a vinyl finish that's easy to keep clean.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
